subject: running WARP in Linux
body:
Hello,

I used to us the WARP 1.0 on Windows and now am switching to WARP 2.0 on 
Ubuntu. I have followed the Github pape and installed WARP in a conda 
environment. How shall I launch the graphic WARP viewer? Or does it run by 
command lines and where to find a sheet of command lines?  Sorry for the 
silly questions.

Thanks a lot!

Kind regards,
Yan
